SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.main

Class Factories

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.main.Factories
public class Factories extends Object
Factories for pluggable components.

This is a factories container for extensible components.

You may write a plugin to inject yours.

See Also:
  • Plugin

  • Field Details

    • log

      private static final org.apache.logging.log4j.Logger log

    • behaviour

      private static Callable<Behaviour> behaviour
      SMTP client behaviour.

      The logic of the client.

    • session

      private static Callable<Session> session
      Session.

      Used by both client and server.

    • tlsSocket

      private static Callable<TLSSocket> tlsSocket
      TLS socket implementation.

      Implements TLS handshake.

    • trustManager

      private static Callable<X509TrustManager> trustManager
      Trust manager implementation.

      Implements javax.net.ssl.X509TrustManager.

    • database

      private static Callable<DigestCache> database
      Digest MD5 database.

      Only used for subsequent authentication.

    • queueDatabase

      private static Callable<QueueDatabase<RelaySession>> queueDatabase
      Queue database implementation.

      Used for persistent queue storage.

    • storageClient

      private static Callable<StorageClient> storageClient
      MTA storage client.

      Used to store MTA emails received.

    • storageProcessors

      private static final List<Callable<StorageProcessor>> storageProcessors
      MTA storage processors.

      Used to do post receipt processing like virus and spam scanning or dovecot LDA delivery.

    • externalClients

      private static final Map<String,Callable<ExternalClient>> externalClients
      External clients.

      Used to fetch external service logs for assertion.

    • bots

      private static final Map<String,BotProcessor> bots
      Bot processors.

      Map of bot name to bot processor instance.

      Using ConcurrentHashMap for thread-safe read/write operations.

    • ipPoolSelector

      private static Callable<IpPoolSelector> ipPoolSelector
      IP pool selector implementation.

      When set, overrides the default weighted round-robin pool selector.

    • dkimSigner

      private static Callable<DkimSigner> dkimSigner
      DKIM signer implementation.

      When set, overrides the config-based backend selection in relay signing.

    • webhookCaller

      private static Callable<WebhookCallerInterface> webhookCaller
      Webhook caller implementation.

      When set, overrides the default WebhookCaller.

  • Constructor Details

    • Factories

      private Factories()
      Protected constructor.

      public static X509TrustManager getTrustManager() throws Exception
      Gets TrustManager.

      TrustManager instance.
      Throws:
      Exception - If the TrustManager cannot be created.

      Gets StorageClient.

      extension - File extension.
      Returns:
      StorageClient instance.

    • getStorageProcessors

      public static List<Callable<StorageProcessor>> getStorageProcessors()
      Gets StorageProcessors.
      Returns:
      list of Callable.

    • addStorageProcessor

      public static void addStorageProcessor(Callable<StorageProcessor> storageProcessor)
      Adds StorageProcessor.
      Parameters:
      storageProcessor - StorageProcessor callable.

    • setStorageProcessors

      public static void setStorageProcessors(List<Callable<StorageProcessor>> processors)
      Sets StorageProcessors, replacing all existing entries.
      Parameters:
      processors - List of StorageProcessor callables.

    • clearStorageProcessors

      public static void clearStorageProcessors()
      Clears all StorageProcessors.

    • putExternalClient

      public static void putExternalClient(String key, Callable<ExternalClient> callable)
      Puts ExternalClient.
      Parameters:
      key - Config map key.
      callable - ExternalClient callable.

    • getExternalClient

      public static ExternalClient getExternalClient(String key, Connection connection, BasicConfig config)
      Gets ExternalClient by key.
      Parameters:
      key - Config map key.
      connection - Connection instance.
      config - BasicConfig instance.
      Returns:
      ExternalClient instance.

    • getExternalKeys

      public static List<String> getExternalKeys()
      Gets ExternalClient keys.
      Returns:
      list of String.

    • registerBot

      public static void registerBot(BotProcessor bot)
      Registers a bot processor.

      Thread-safe thanks to ConcurrentHashMap.

      Parameters:
      bot - Bot processor to register.

    • getBot

      public static Optional<BotProcessor> getBot(String name)
      Gets a bot processor by name.
      Parameters:
      name - Bot name (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      Optional containing the bot processor if found.

    • hasBot

      public static boolean hasBot(String name)
      Checks if a bot is registered.
      Parameters:
      name - Bot name (case-insensitive).
      Returns:
      true if bot is registered.

    • getBotNames

      public static String[] getBotNames()
      Gets all registered bot names.
      Returns:
      Array of bot names.

    • setIpPoolSelector

      public static void setIpPoolSelector(Callable<IpPoolSelector> callable)
      Sets IpPoolSelector callable.
      Parameters:
      callable - IpPoolSelector callable.

    • getIpPoolSelector

      public static IpPoolSelector getIpPoolSelector()
      Gets IpPoolSelector.

      Returns a default IpPoolSelector backed by the relay config when no override is registered.

      Returns:
      IpPoolSelector instance.

    • setDkimSigner

      public static void setDkimSigner(Callable<DkimSigner> callable)
      Sets DkimSigner callable.

      When set, overrides the config-based backend (rspamd or native) selected by the dkimSigning.backend config field.

      Parameters:
      callable - DkimSigner callable.

    • getDkimSigner

      public static DkimSigner getDkimSigner()
      Gets DkimSigner.

      Returns null if no override has been registered; callers should then fall back to config-based backend selection.

      Returns:
      DkimSigner instance, or null if not registered.

    • setQueueDatabase

      public static void setQueueDatabase(Callable<QueueDatabase<RelaySession>> callable)
      Sets QueueDatabase callable for custom factory override.

      Used primarily in tests to inject custom queue implementations.

      Parameters:
      callable - QueueDatabase callable

    • getQueueDatabase

      public static QueueDatabase<RelaySession> getQueueDatabase()
      Gets QueueDatabase instance using configuration-based backend selection.

      If a custom factory has been set via setQueueDatabase(Callable), uses that. Otherwise delegates to QueueFactory.createQueueDatabase() which selects backend based on configuration priority: MapDB → MariaDB → PostgreSQL → InMemory.

      Returns:
      QueueDatabase instance

    • setWebhookCaller

      public static void setWebhookCaller(Callable<WebhookCallerInterface> callable)
      Sets WebhookCaller callable.
      Parameters:
      callable - WebhookCallerInterface callable.

    • getWebhookCaller

      public static WebhookCallerInterface getWebhookCaller()
      Gets WebhookCallerInterface instance.
      Returns:
      WebhookCallerInterface instance.
